headlines.title: Trump’s endorsement faces another test in Louisiana Senate primary runoff
headlines.description: President Donald Trump’s endorsement will once again be on the ballot Saturday in the GOP primary runoff for Senate in Louisiana.

headlines.title: Ex-Trump adviser John Bolton pleads guilty to mishandling classified information
headlines.description: The former national security adviser pleaded guilty in federal court to mishandling classified information related to his work during Trump’s first term.

headlines.title: Epstein associate Leon Black leaves testimony early with subpoenas
headlines.description: Billionaire business associate of Jeffery Epstein, Leon Black, cut short his testimony to the House Oversight Committee after being issued two subpoenas by Chairman James Comer. NBC News’ Julie Tsirkin explains.

headlines.title: Pete Buttigieg briefly separated from his kids over false report
headlines.description: Former Secretary of Transportation Pete Buttigieg says he was separated from his four-year-old twins after an anonymous report was made to Child Protective Services that authorities have confirmed was false. NBC News’ Jonathan Allen explains Buttigieg’s response to what he is calling a politically motivated attack.

headlines.title: Democratic candidate challenging Rep. Lawler on her bid to ‘tear down political silos’
headlines.description: New York U.S. House candidate and combat veteran Cait Conley (D) joins Meet the Press NOW following her primary win. She faces incumbent Republican Rep. Mike Lawler in one of November’s most closely watched races as Democrats try to flip the House.

headlines.title: Civil rights, moon landings and war wins: What Americans see as the country’s greatest achievements
headlines.description: The NBC News poll asked American adults which historical event they thought was the country’s biggest accomplishment in its 250 years.

headlines.title: State Assemblyman Alex Bores speaks on AI and politics
headlines.description: State Assemblyman Alex Bores, a candidate for New York's 12th Congressional District, speaks with NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz about why some top artificial intelligence companies are opposing his candidacy and whether AI should play a role in politics.

headlines.title: U.S. government gives Anthropic green light for limited re-release of Mythos 5
headlines.description: The U.S. government is allowing Anthropic to deploy its Mythos 5 model to a select group of customers and partners, according to a letter from Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick to Anthropic that was seen by NBC News

headlines.title: Pete Buttigieg targeted by ‘false report’ to authorities involving his 4-year-old twins
headlines.description: The former transportation secretary said he was forced to spend 24 hours away from his 4-year-old twins during the probe. Police determined it was a false report.

headlines.title: What if the economy gets better and it doesn’t help the GOP?: From the Politics Desk
headlines.description: In today’s edition, Jonathan Allen goes back to the ‘90s to explain the economic challenge Republicans face in this fall’s midterms.

headlines.title: The Force is with him: D.C. settles with man who protested National Guard using Darth Vader’s theme song
headlines.description: The District of Columbia has settled a lawsuit by a protester who said he was detained and handcuffed for following National Guard troops around the city while playing Darth Vader’s theme song from “Star Wars.”

headlines.title: After losing one billionaire tax battle, Gavin Newsom prepares to wage another
headlines.description: California’s governor, who is considering a White House run, proposed an expansive national wealth tax, as well as an initiative to give Americans a stake in AI.
